mapper.select:
SELECT p.PLACE_ID as placeId, p.PLACE_NAME as name, p.IMAGE_URL as imageUrl, p.ADDRESS as region, a.ACCOMMODATION_TYPE as accommodationType, p.LATITUDE as latitude, p.LONGITUDE as longitude, MIN(r.AMOUNT + (GREATEST(0, (#{adult} + #{child}) - r.ROOMBASECOUNT) * 20000)) as minPrice
, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOKMARK bk WHERE bk.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID AND bk.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}) as isBookmarked
, 0 as isBookmarked
FROM PLACE p JOIN ACCOMMODATION a ON p.PLACE_ID = a.PLACE_ID JOIN ROOM r ON a.PLACE_ID = r.PLACE_ID
LEFT JOIN ACCOMMODATION_FACILITY af ON a.AF_ID = af.AF_ID LEFT JOIN ROOM_FACILITY rf ON r.RF_ID = rf.RF_ID WHERE 1=1
AND r.ROOM_COUNT > ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RESERVATION res WHERE res.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID AND res.STATUS = 'SUCCESS' AND TRUNC(res.CHECK_IN_DATE) < TO_DATE(#{checkout}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TRUNC(res.CHECK_OUT_DATE) > TO_DATE(#{checkin}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') )
AND p.ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{region} || '%'
AND a.ACCOMMODATION_TYPE IN
#{type}
AND r.AMOUNT >= #{minPrice}
AND r.AMOUNT <= #{maxPrice}
AND r.MAX_CAPACITY >= (#{adult} + #{child})
AND af.FITNESS = 1 AND af.CHKCOOKING = 1 AND af.BARBECUE = 1 AND af.BEVERAGE = 1 AND af.KARAOKE = 1 AND af.PUBLICPC = 1 AND af.SAUNA = 1
AND rf.ROOMBATHFACILITY = 1 AND rf.ROOMBATH = 1 AND rf.ROOMHOMETHEATER = 1 AND rf.ROOMAIRCONDITION = 1 AND rf.ROOMTV = 1 AND rf.ROOMPC = 1 AND rf.ROOMINTERNET = 1 AND rf.ROOMREFRIGERATOR = 1 AND rf.ROOMTOILETRIES = 1 AND rf.ROOMSOFA = 1 AND rf.ROOMTABLE = 1 AND rf.ROOMHAIRDRYER = 1
GROUP BY p.PLACE_ID, p.PLACE_NAME, p.IMAGE_URL, p.ADDRESS, a.ACCOMMODATION_TYPE, p.LATITUDE, p.LONGITUDE
ORDER BY
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOKMARK b WHERE b.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID) DESC, p.PLACE_ID DESC
MIN(r.AMOUNT + (GREATEST(0, (#{adult} + #{child}) - r.ROOMBASECOUNT) * 20000)) ASC
MIN(r.AMOUNT + (GREATEST(0, (#{adult} + #{child}) - r.ROOMBASECOUNT) * 20000)) DESC
MAX(p.CREATEDTIME) DESC
((p.LATITUDE - #{userLat}) * (p.LATITUDE - #{userLat}) + (p.LONGITUDE - #{userLng}) * (p.LONGITUDE - #{userLng})) ASC
p.PLACE_ID DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT p.PLACE_ID as placeId, p.PLACE_NAME as name, p.IMAGE_URL as imageUrl, p.ADDRESS as region, p.DESCRIPTION as description, p.LATITUDE as latitude, p.LONGITUDE as longitude, a.CHECKINTIME as checkinTime, a.CHECKOUTTIME as checkoutTime, a.PARKINGLODGING as parkinglodging,
af.FITNESS as fitness, af.CHKCOOKING as chkcooking, af.BARBECUE as barbecue, af.BEVERAGE as beverage, af.KARAOKE as karaoke, af.PUBLICPC as publicpc, af.SAUNA as sauna
, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOKMARK bk WHERE bk.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID AND bk.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}) as isBookmarked
, 0 as isBookmarked
FROM PLACE p JOIN ACCOMMODATION a ON p.PLACE_ID = a.PLACE_ID LEFT JOIN ACCOMMODATION_FACILITY af ON a.AF_ID = af.AF_ID WHERE p.PLACE_ID = #{placeId}

SELECT r.ROOM_ID as roomId, r.ROOM_NAME as roomName, r.ROOMBASECOUNT as roomBaseCount, r.MAX_CAPACITY as maxCapacity, r.AMOUNT as amount, r.ROOMINTRO as roomIntro, r.ROOM_COUNT as roomCount,
(SELECT MIN(ri.IMAGE_URL) FROM ROOM_IMAGE ri WHERE ri.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID) as roomImageUrl
FROM ROOM r WHERE r.PLACE_ID = #{placeId} ORDER BY r.AMOUNT ASC

SELECT r.ROOM_ID as roomId, r.ROOM_NAME as roomName, r.ROOMBASECOUNT as roomBaseCount, r.MAX_CAPACITY as maxCapacity, r.AMOUNT as amount, r.ROOMINTRO as roomIntro, r.ROOM_COUNT as roomCount, p.PLACE_NAME as placeName FROM ROOM r JOIN PLACE p ON r.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID WHERE r.ROOM_ID = #{roomId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ROOM_LOCK WHERE EXPIRE_AT < SYSDATE
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ROOM_LOCK WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId} AND CHECKIN_DATE = #{checkin} AND SESSION_ID != #{sessionId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ROOM_LOCK WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId} AND CHECKIN_DATE = #{checkin} AND SESSION_ID = #{sessionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ROOM_LOCK (ROOM_ID, CHECKIN_DATE, SESSION_ID) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{checkin}, #{sessionId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ROOM_LOCK WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId} AND CHECKIN_DATE = #{checkin} AND SESSION_ID = #{sessionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ORDERS (ORDER_ID, MEMBER_ID, ORDER_DATE, TOTAL_AMOUNT, COUPON_DISCOUNT, REAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT, STATUS) VALUES (#{merchantUid}, #{memberId}, SYSDATE, #{amount}, 0, #{amount}, 'SUCCESS')

SELECT RESERVATION_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO RESERVATION ( RESERVATION_ID, ROOM_ID, MEMBER_ID, PARTNER_ID, CHECK_IN_DATE, CHECK_OUT_DATE, GUEST_COUNT, STATUS, REQUEST, AMOUNT, COMMISSION_RATE, PARTNER_COUPON_FEE ) VALUES ( #{reservationId}, #{roomId}, #{memberId}, 1, TO_DATE(#{checkin}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{checkout}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), (#{adult} + #{child}), 'SUCCESS', #{request}, #{amount}, 10, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOKMARK WHERE PLACE_ID = #{placeId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOOKMARK (BOOKMARK_ID, MEMBER_ID, CREATED_AT, PLACE_ID) VALUES (BOOKMARK_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, SYSDATE, #{placeId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM BOOKMARK WHERE PLACE_ID = #{placeId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RESERVATION WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId} AND STATUS = 'SUCCESS' AND TRUNC(CHECK_IN_DATE) < TO_DATE(#{checkout}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TRUNC(CHECK_OUT_DATE) > TO_DATE(#{checkin}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT TO_CHAR(res.CHECK_IN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "checkIn", TO_CHAR(res.CHECK_OUT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "checkOut" FROM RESERVATION res JOIN ROOM r ON res.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID WHERE r.PLACE_ID = #{placeId} AND res.STATUS = 'SUCCESS' AND res.CHECK_OUT_DATE > SYSDATE
